reminders.description: Pack kayak gear for Manchac Swamp trip with Troy. PFDs, paddle, dry bag, lunch, sunscreen.

reminders.description: T-Mobile phone bill — $85.

reminders.title: Pick up dry cleaning — Rouses Plaza
reminders.description: Concert button-up shirt and choir blacks.

reminders.title: Chase Freedom CC payment
reminders.description: Pay Chase Freedom credit card balance. Check statement first.

reminders.title: Submit Q3 documentation by EOD Friday
reminders.description: Renata's quarterly audit prep. All October session notes due by 4:30 PM Friday. Block the whole afternoon if needed.

reminders.title: Transfer $300 to grad cert fund
reminders.description: Monthly auto-transfer from Chase 4782 to savings 9103. Confirm the transfer cleared after the 1st.

reminders.title: Session prep — Ethan Tran (Week 8)
reminders.description: Review Week 7 notes before Ethan's session. Check parent form for any updates.

reminders.title: Complete weekly session documentation
reminders.description: Finish all session notes for the week. Q4 audit approaching per Renata.

reminders.title: Drop Silverado at Firestone — 8 AM tomorrow
reminders.description: Oil change and tire rotation at Firestone on Carrollton Ave. 8 AM.

reminders.title: Session prep — Ethan Tran (Week 12)
reminders.description: Review Week 11 notes before Ethan's session. Huxley vet this week too.

reminders.title: Huxley vet — Dec 5, 10 AM. Bring carrier.
reminders.description: Annual checkup at Bayou Exotic Animal Clinic with Dr. Sato. Remember the carrier.

reminders.title: RSVP — Vox NOLA holiday potluck
reminders.description: Felix sent the sign-up. Bring a side dish.

reminders.title: Crickets + greens for Huxley
reminders.description: Live crickets (1000 ct) and collard greens — PetSmart Veterans. Last bag of greens ran out yesterday.

reminders.title: Renew vehicle registration (LA plate BRX-4471)
reminders.description: Silverado registration expires end of January. Renew online at expresslane.org. Bring proof of insurance.

reminders.title: Schedule Ethan home visit — Feb 4, 2 PM (per parent form)
reminders.description: Vanessa Tran's parent form requested a home visit for Feb 4 at 2 PM. Verify with Renata before scheduling — clinic does not do home visits without director approval.

reminders.title: Replace Huxley's UVB bulb
reminders.description: 6-month UVB replacement for Huxley's enclosure. Last replaced in July 2025. Reprilux T5 10.0, 24in. Order from Amazon or pick up at PetSmart on Veterans Blvd.

reminders.title: Pack for Horseshoe Canyon — leave early Friday
reminders.description: Pack climbing gear: rack, draws, rope, harnesses, helmet. Cabin booked at Horseshoe Canyon Ranch. Leaving early Friday with Troy.

reminders.title: Drop off Huxley with Simone — Friday 6 PM
reminders.description: Simone is keeping Huxley over the Houston weekend. Carrier, two days of greens, calcium, UVB schedule note.

reminders.title: Pack for Houston — flight 2:30 PM tomorrow
reminders.description: Pack overnight bag for Houston. Flight WN2847 MSY→HOU 2:30 PM. Game at Toyota Center at 7 PM. Hotel: SpringHill Suites.

reminders.title: Take Zyrtec
reminders.description: Daily cetirizine. Take with breakfast.

reminders.title: Start daily Zyrtec — spring allergy season
reminders.description: Pollen and mold season starting in NOLA. Take cetirizine 10mg daily with breakfast. Check if there's any left from fall or grab a new box at Walgreens on Canal.

reminders.title: Grab Zyrtec and tissues — Walgreens Canal St
reminders.description: 90-count Zyrtec (cetirizine) and tissues. Walgreens at 3500 Canal St.

reminders.title: Schedule annual PCP appointment
reminders.description: Call Dr. Landry's office. Due for annual physical. Mention allergy season and current OTC cetirizine.

reminders.title: Concert tickets — set Trippy alert for spring tour
reminders.description: Galactic spring tour announce — Tipitina's likely. Set price alert and grab two when they go on sale.

reminders.title: Call accountant — schedule tax appointment this week
reminders.description: Call David Nguyen to schedule annual tax prep appointment. Have all documents ready.

reminders.title: Renew climbing gym membership (annual)
reminders.description: NOLA Climbing Co. annual renewal comes up. Compare the annual rate to monthly — last year annual was cheaper by ~$60.

reminders.title: PCP appointment — Dr. Landry, 3 PM
reminders.description: Annual physical at 3 PM. Bring up seasonal allergies, daily Zyrtec, and anything else. Office on Napoleon Ave.

reminders.title: Bi-weekly parent update — Ethan Tran
reminders.description: Send Ethan Tran bi-weekly progress summary to parent and school coordinator per parent form request.

reminders.title: Confirm Q1 documentation submission
reminders.description: Q1 audit close-out. Verify all 13 weeks of session notes are submitted before Renata's review.
